content.text:
Here are several excellent spa alternatives to Woodhouse Spa in Katy, Houston—spanning head and facial treatments, massages, holistic therapies, medical spa services, and even Korean-style saunas. Each offers a distinct experience, whether you're seeking quiet luxury, specialized wellness, or group-friendly services.

---

### 1. **TSUKI Facial & Spa**
- Offers customized facials and signature "head spa" rituals combining scalp therapy with mini or full facials.  
- Treatments last between 90 and 150 minutes and start around $75–$135.  
([tsukispa.com](https://tsukispa.com/?utm_source=openai))

 Ideal for those looking for tailored skincare in a serene, minimalist setting.

---

### 2. **Spavia Cinco Ranch**
- A full-service day spa offering massages, facials, body treatments, waxing, and men's services within resort-like amenities such as plush robes and tranquil retreat rooms.  
- Located at 10705 Spring Green Boulevard, Suite 600.  
([cincoranchtx.spaviadayspa.com](https://cincoranchtx.spaviadayspa.com/?utm_source=openai))

 Perfect for spa-goers who enjoy a luxurious, all-inclusive atmosphere.

---

### 3. **Sole Reflextions**
- Specializes in reflexology and foot-focused spa treatments for feet, legs, arms, neck, and shoulders.  
- Open daily from 10 AM–9 PM, located at 2212 Katy Flewellen Rd #200.  
- A second location opens mid-July at 6845 Peek Rd, Suite 160.  
([bizarchive.com](https://www.bizarchive.com/business/sole-reflextions_1d-281-712-2239?utm_source=openai))

 Great option if you're looking for a relaxing, reflexology-centered experience.

---

### 4. **The Perfect Touch Spa**
- Offers facials, chemical peels, microneedling, and body sculpting services.  
- Located at 2027 N Mason Rd #304, open Monday–Saturday.  
([theperfecttouchspa.com](https://www.theperfecttouchspa.com/?utm_source=openai))

 A good alternative for specialized facial and aesthetic skincare treatments.

---

### 5. **Holistique Healing Spa**
- Provides infrared sauna, lymphatic drainage, therapeutic massage, TCM cupping, gua sha therapy, and steam rooms.  
- Located at 406 W Grand Pkwy S #280, open daily from approximately 8:30 AM–7:30 PM.  
([plungesaunafinder.com](https://www.plungesaunafinder.com/texas/katy/holistique-healing-spa?utm_source=openai))

 A holistic, wellness-focused retreat offering both Eastern therapies and modern modalities.

---

### 6. **Tech Sauna Spa**
- A mix of deep tissue massage, head therapy, foot massage, sauna capsule, cupping, body scrubs, and more, with complimentary hot stone in every service.  
- Convenient location at 21777 Merchants Way #330, open daily 10 AM–8 PM.  
([techsauna-spa.com](https://techsauna-spa.com/?utm_source=openai))

 A practical yet luxurious environment ideal for stress relief and recovery at a competitive price.

---

### 7. **All is Well Holistic Spa**
- Features massage therapies (Swedish, lymphatic drainage, prenatal, hot stone, sports, deep tissue), facial/skin care, holistic treatments, and glamorous party suites (including couples and spa party rooms).  
- Located at 2001 Katy Mills Blvd, Ste I, open Monday and Wednesday–Sunday 9 AM–8 PM.  
([spaweek.com](https://www.spaweek.com/spa/42405/all-is-well-spa?utm_source=openai))

 Excellent for group outings or someone seeking a blend of holistic care and community experience.

---

### 8. **Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics (Med Spa)**
- Offers medical-style services including IV therapy, Botox, dermal fillers, advanced facials (HydraFacial, peels, PRP), body sculpting, cryotherapy, weight loss injections, and luxury facials like the Valmont Serenity Wellness facial (~$400).  
- Located at 28111 S Firethorne Rd Suite 601; open Monday–Thursday 9 AM–8 PM, Friday–Saturday until 9 PM, Sunday until 5 PM.  
([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai))

 Perfect for those wanting a high-end medical spa experience for rejuvenation and advanced skincare.

---

### 9. **Suimin Spa**
- Offers head spa (scalp and neck/shoulder relaxation using Eastern methods), customized facials (brightening, lifting, express, collagen boosting), and massages—all in a serene setting.  
- Located at 1830 S Mason Rd, Suite 115; bookings available online.  
([suiminspa.com](https://www.suiminspa.com/?utm_source=openai))

 Offers a beautifully balanced blend of scalp, skin, and full-body wellness.

---

### Bonus: **Korean-Style Spa**
Though not a traditional day spa, **"Spa World"** was recommended by locals as a Korean spa alternative nearby—offering sauna rooms, soaking baths, and more akin to bathhouse-style relaxation.  
([reddit.com](https://www.reddit.com/r/AskHouston/comments/1ozzo3n/looking_for_a_spa_recommendation/?utm_source=openai))

---

### Quick Comparison Table

| Spa                            | Specialty / Vibe                                   | Standout Feature                             |
|--------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| TSUKI Facial & Spa            | Minimalist, bespoke facials & head spa              | Scalp + facial combo                         |
| Spavia Cinco Ranch            | Full-service resort-day spa                        | Resort-amenity feel                          |
| Sole Reflextions              | Reflexology & foot-centric treatments              | Opening a second location soon                |
| The Perfect Touch Spa         | Advanced skincare treatments                       | Peels, microneedling                         |
| Holistique Healing Spa        | Holistic & TCM-based treatments                    | Infrared sauna & cupping                     |
| Tech Sauna Spa                | All-around wellness (massage, sauna, spa)          | Package flexibility & hot stone included     |
| All is Well Holistic Spa      | Holistic massages + group spa parties              | Party suites & full-body care                |
| Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics | Medical-grade beauty & wellness                  | IV, injectables, advanced facials            |
| Suimin Spa                    | Eastern-infused spa experience                     | Scalp/beauty fusion                          |
| Spa World (Korean spa)        | Bathhouse with sauna rooms                         | Korean-style sauna experience                |

---

### Recommendations Based on Your Preference

- Want the **woodhouse-style serene luxury**? Try **TSUKI** or **Spavia Cinco Ranch**.  
- Seeking **holistic and body-focused wellness**? Go for **Holistique Healing Spa**, **Tech Sauna Spa**, or **All is Well**.  
- Interested in **advanced beauty or medical treatments**? **Revitalize** is your go-to.  
- Craving a **unique scalp treatment** with facial perks? **Suimin Spa** fits well.  
- In the mood for a **Korean sauna-style experience**? Try local **Spa World** if available.

---

If you'd like help narrowing it down based on your budget, preferred treatments, or whether you'd like a solo or group experience, feel free to let me know—I’d be happy to assist further!
